content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于11月1日18:00(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年11月14日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 调整即将开放的内容细节，对于当前内容没有影响。

V2.3.4.3 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on November 1 at 18:00(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on November 14, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Adjustments will be made to the details of upcoming content, with no impact on current content.

embeds.description: > Secret Keepers, in order to ensure the security of everyone's information, assets, and a fair gaming environment, the "Forget the Eve" operation team will continue to crack down on and deal with accounts that use scripts, plug-ins, loopholes, illegal transactions, etc. to generate improper profits

thread_title: 關於腳本/外掛賬號的處理說明
